channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Meru Residents Collect Milk from Overturned Tanker After Accident
item.description: On Wednesday, March 18, 2026, chaotic scenes unfolded along Kanyuru Road in Meru Town when a tanker carrying milk developed brake failure and rolled into a nearby ditch. Locals quickly rushed to colle...

item.title: Kenyan Police Complete Second Deployment in Haiti, Return Home Safely
item.description: Nairobi — Kenya has officially welcomed back the second batch of its police officers who were deployed to Haiti under the Multinational Security Support Mission. A total of 215 officers returned safel...

item.title: Pakistan prolongs airspace closure for Indian aircraft until April 24
item.description: Pakistan’s civil aviation authorities have decided to extend the closure of the country’s airspace to all Indian-registered aircraft until April 24, 2026, according to a fresh Notam issued by the Paki...

item.title: Spice Girls 30th Anniversary Reunion Tour Cancelled Amid Band Disagreements

item.title: First Dog on the Moon cartoon satirises invasive fire ants impacting Queensland
item.description: This piece is a satirical cartoon by First Dog on the Moon, published in The Guardian's Comment is Free section on 18 March 2026. The cartoon humorously exaggerates the role of invasive ants—likely re...

item.title: Ishaq Dar to attend Riyadh meeting, calls for dialogue to resolve Middle East crisis
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister of Pakistan, Ishaq Dar, is scheduled to leave for Riyadh on 18th March for a meeting with foreign ministers from the region. The focus of this visit is to ur...

item.title: Ex-Cellmate Letter Alleges Links Between Matlala and High-Ranking Officials

item.title: Eight members of a family die in Indore house fire caused by electric vehicle explosion
item.description: Early on Wednesday, 18th March 2026, a tragic incident occurred in Indore where eight members of a family, including two children, lost their lives in a fire that broke out due to an explosion at an e...

item.title: Oil price surge raises short-term inflation concerns, long-term outlook remains stable
item.description: Recent spikes in oil and energy prices, driven largely by geopolitical tensions in Iran, have caused a noticeable short-term increase in inflation expectations among investors and financial markets. C...

item.title: How to Manage Your Social Media Scrolling Habits
item.description: The article explains the concept of infinite scroll, a feature on social media, shopping, and video apps that continuously loads content as you browse, making it hard to stop. This design exploits hum...

item.title: Jessica Alba and Cash Warren finalize divorce and agree to equal asset division
item.description: Jessica Alba and Cash Warren have officially finalized their divorce after more than a year of separation, marking the end of their 16-year marriage. According to court filings signed on March 16 and ...

item.title: Court Declares Nigerians Get Right to Record Police Officers on Duty and Bans Anonymous Policing
item.description: The Federal High Court for Warri, Delta State don give one major judgment wey confirm say Nigerians get full constitutional right to record, snap, or document police officers when dem dey work for pub...

item.title: Northern Ontario municipalities request federal support to improve Highway 11 and 17 safety and infrastructure
item.description: Northern Ontario is facing a deadly winter on its main highways, prompting local politicians to urgently seek federal support. The Northwestern Ontario Municipalities Association (NOMA) has written to...

item.title: Railway officials can travel with families on luxury trains as per norms: Minister Vaishnaw
item.description: In a written statement in the Lok Sabha on Wednesday, Railway Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw clarified that railway officials are allowed to travel with their families on Indian Railways trains only in acc...

item.title: Understanding Responsibility for Lost Mobile Money in Tanzania

item.title: Meru Court Sentences Two Men to Death for Armed Robbery of Woman
item.description: In Meru County, the Office of the Director of Public Prosecutions (ODPP) successfully secured a death sentence against two men, Douglas Muriithi and Anthony Mugendi, who were convicted of robbery with...

item.title: Nigel Farage’s Paid Cameo Messages Include Controversial Requests
item.description: Nigel Farage, the leader of Reform UK, reportedly earns additional income through paid video messages on the platform Cameo. An analysis of over 4,000 of these videos suggests that, while many are lig...
